title: Ballistix
description: Ballistix is a Minecraft Mod that introduces intercontinental ballistic missiles (ICBM's), various explosives, sentries, and weapons to Minecraft.
body: **As of the 1st of June 2025, all future updates for ampz mods will require Voltaic API, and not Electrodynamics, in order to function. This update affects all the mods and brings world breaking changes, which are written in the changelogs. Note that this should however not corrupt your world. If you have such issues reach out on our discord channel!** ![Nuclear Explosions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd611db550f8e0a590f965ab50969d5d5c8684a0.jpeg) Ballistix is a Minecraft Mod that introduces intercontinental ballistic missiles, various explosives, sentries, and weapons to Minecraft. **This project is based upon [Voltaic](https://modrinth.com/project/voltaic) and requires this mod to run. Nuclear Science and Electrodynamics are optional addons that will increase realism related to radiation and recipes.** **Join us on discord:** ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/569969909380153345.svg?label=Join%20us%20on%20Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=FFFFFF&style=flat-square) [Click here](https://discord.gg/bzH7CdQWRb) **You should also check out my new Patreon:** [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api?username=aurilisdev&type=patrons&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.patreon.com/aurilisdev) **You should also check out our official modpack here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/ampz-1-18** **It is a recreation of voltz for minecraft 1.20**  [Link to electrodynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/electrodynamics)  [Link to nuclear science](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuclear-science) *** **Features:**  * Long range missiles * Loads of different explosives * Nuclear Bombs * Rocket Launchers * Grenades **Permission to use in modpacks:** Yes you are allowed to do this: However, as written in the license (special permissions referring to distribution):  ``` You may only use the special permissions above, if you provide proper attribution to the Owner of this software "Sebastian Siljuholtet Johansen" (in the form of credit) and an URL to this Software�s official download page were the pack is accessed. ```
